transcript:
CALLER: Hello. Mujhe yeh confirm karna tha ki mera insurance se jo amount settle hua, usske baad balance kya bacha hai mujhe pay karna.
AGENT: Bilkul. Aapka naam aur patient ID please?
CALLER: Arun Gokhale. Patient ID P-zero-zero-seven-eight-nine.
AGENT: Mr. Gokhale, aapke records dekhta hoon. Total bill tha ₹38,500. HDFC Ergo ne ₹31,200 settle kar diya hai. Aapka outstanding balance ₹7,300 hai.
CALLER: Theek hai. Main UPI se pay kar sakta hoon abhi?
AGENT: Haan bilkul. Payment link bhej deta hoon aapke registered number pe. Complete karne ke baad receipt SMS pe aayega.
CALLER: Done, paid. Message aa gaya.
AGENT: Bahut acha! Aapka account fully cleared ho gaya hai. Koi aur sawaal?
CALLER: Nahi, shukriya.
AGENT: Aapka swagat hai, Mr. Gokhale!
